Parameter: Nutrient (Mineral) Deficiencies and Their Associated Syndrome
Spinach: N: Pale leaves, stunted; Fe: Interveinal chlorosis in young leaves; B: Heart rot
Amaranthus: N: Pale green leaves; P: Purpling of leaves; Ca: Tip death
Drumstick: N: Pale leaves; P: Poor flowering; B: Fruit cracking/deformity
Coriander: N: Pale leaves; P: Stunted, purplish leaves
Curry Leaf: N: Yellowing of leaves; Fe: Chlorosis on terminal leaves; Mg: Interveinal yellowing
Lettuce: N: Pale leaves; Ca: Tip burn; B: Brittle/thick leaves
Cabbage: B: Hollow stem; Mo: Whiptail; Ca: Tip burn; N: Pale leaves
Cauliflower: B: Browning of curd/hollow stem; Mo: Whiptail; N: Small yellow leaves; Mg: Chlorosis
Gongura: N: Stunted, pale green; P: Reduced size, dark green
